CustomField.description: This flags whether or not the school has reached the student added threshold criteria or not. If there is a date in the students_added_threshold_met_date__c, then this will be set to true.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: This flags whether or not the school has reached the student added threshold criteria or not. If there is a date in the students_added_threshold_met_date__c, then this will be set to true.
CustomField.label: Student Added Threshold Met
